summary: Frontend UI/UX upgrade testing completed for OmniVital wellness app. All 11 test cases passed. Verified new hero background, Experience section with 4 steps, glassmorphism styling, sharp corners, Voice Agent button upgrade, and navigation flows.
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - tested public routes only
seed_data_creation: None - products are from static file src/data/products.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX upgrade features verified working: 1) New hero background (dark moody mountain, no supplement bottles), 2) Navbar has 3 nav items (Products, Experience, Science) plus Sign In/Join CTA, 3) Experience section at /#experience with 4 steps (Meet OV, Build Your Ritual, Track & Quantify, Find Your People), 4) Experience cards have glassmorphism (backdrop-blur(12px)) with teal left accent lines and sharp corners, 5) Product cards use rounded-sm for sharp corners, 6) Voice Agent button shows inverted/rotated logo (rotate-180 brightness-0 invert) with NO text label, 7) Voice Agent popup has close (X) button and 'Ritual Advisor' title with logo icon, 8) Product Detail page renders correctly with daily ritual pricing, 9) Experience CTA links to /auth correctly.

homepage_hero_load.details: Hero section loads with new atmospheric background. No supplement bottle text conflicts. Navbar visible with Products, Experience, Science links and Sign In/Join CTA.

navbar_nav_items.details: Navbar has 3 nav items: Products (/#ritual), Experience (/#experience), Science (/#science). Sign In/Join CTA visible.

experience_section_visible.details: Experience section visible at /#experience with 'The Experience' header and 'A Wellness Operating System' subtitle.

experience_4_steps.details: All 4 steps visible: Meet OV (Your Personal Advisor), Build Your Ritual (Morning · Midday · Evening), Track & Quantify (Data-Driven Wellness), Find Your People (Color-Matched Community).

experience_glassmorphism_styling.details: Experience cards have glassmorphism: backdrop-filter blur(12px), sharp corners (borderRadius: 0px from rounded-sm), teal left accent lines (2px width).

product_cards_sharp_corners.details: Product cards have rounded-sm class for sharp corners. CSS --radius variable set to 0.125rem.

voice_agent_button_no_text.details: Voice Agent floating button has NO text label. Button text content is empty.

voice_agent_inverted_logo.details: Voice Agent button shows inverted/rotated logo with classes: 'rotate-180 brightness-0 invert opacity-80' (yin-yang mirror of navbar logo).

voice_agent_popup_close_button.details: Voice Agent popup has close (X) button in header with data-testid='voice-panel-close'. Close button works correctly.

voice_agent_popup_header.details: Voice Agent popup header shows logo icon and 'Ritual Advisor' title.

product_detail_page.details: Product Detail page at /product/ov-drive renders correctly with daily ritual pricing ($2.13 / daily ritual) and Subscribe & Save toggle.

experience_cta_navigation.details: Join The Collective CTA in Experience section (data-testid='experience-cta') links to /auth correctly.
